metadata.description: Claude Code skills for full-stack development, testing, API design, databases, CI/CD, Docker, dependency management, open source contributions, repository maintenance, and everyday dev workflows.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Everyday dev commands -- commit, review, test, fix bugs, create PRs, check repo status, and inspect PR health.

plugins.name: dev-rules
plugins.description: Development guardrails -- git safety, security best practices, PR workflow discipline, and context optimization patterns.

plugins.name: farm-stack
plugins.description: FARM stack (FastAPI + React + MongoDB) development patterns, scaffolding, and best practices.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Test strategy, framework patterns, mocking approaches, fixture design, and coverage guidance for pytest, jest/vitest, go test, and cargo test.

plugins.name: api-design
plugins.description: REST and GraphQL API design -- URL structure, HTTP conventions, error formats, pagination, authentication, versioning, and OpenAPI.

plugins.name: database
plugins.description: Database schema design, migrations, indexing, query optimization, and connection pooling for Postgres, MongoDB, and SQLite.

plugins.name: ci-cd
plugins.description: GitHub Actions CI/CD -- workflow templates, caching, matrix builds, secrets management, release automation, and debugging failing checks.

plugins.name: docker-deploy
plugins.description: Docker best practices -- multi-stage Dockerfiles, compose patterns, image optimization, health checks, signal handling, and security hardening.

plugins.name: deps-audit
plugins.description: Dependency auditing -- vulnerability scanning, outdated package detection, unused dependency identification, and safe update strategies.

plugins.name: oss-contrib
plugins.description: Open source contribution workflow -- upstream sync, CONTRIBUTING.md compliance, code style matching, PR preparation.

plugins.name: repo-polish
plugins.description: Repository hygiene -- .gitignore, .env.example, README, LICENSE generation, secret detection, and project type detection.
